## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start LLMask with `...`
2. Send a request like `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or unexpected output if available.

```
paste error output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| LLMask version | e.g. 0.1.0 (run `npm list` or check package.json) |
| Provider used | e.g. openai / anthropic / gemini / mistral |
| Auth mode | e.g. api_key / oauth_codex / oauth_claude_code |
| Deployment | e.g. local npm, Docker |

## Additional Context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots here. Remove any sensitive data before sharing logs.
